summary: A local ABC2/WBAY-TV news package, reshared by the Department of Labor, about a Wisconsin summer program (WRTP Big Step Trades Academy) introducing high schoolers to skilled-trade apprenticeships. It features a news anchor and an interview with an outreach manager over chyrons and a weather ticker, closing on the DOL seal. It is a straight broadcast-news segment, not a produced or music-driven youth-appeal piece.
notable_text: ACTION 2 NEWS WBAY-TV / ABC2 / chyron: JASMINE CARBAJAL, OUTREACH MANAGER, WTRP/BIG STEP / "...PARTNERSHIP" / "IN A REGISTERED [apprenticeship]"
